hero.title: Science at your fingertips
hero.description: Revolutionize your scientific research with an integrated platform. Odin centralizes your data, optimizes your experiments and facilitates global collaboration.
hero.tryGuest: or explore freely, no sign-up needed

features.title: A web platform built for performance
features.subtitle: Accessible from any browser, no installation required.

browser.title: Optimized for all browsers
browser.description: Compatible with Chrome, Firefox, Safari and Edge. A smooth and fast experience on all your devices.
browser.longDescription: Compatible with Chrome, Firefox, Safari and Edge. Enjoy a smooth and fast experience on all your devices, with no installation or configuration required. Our platform adapts to your environment.

share.title: Universal sharing
share.description: Share your results and reports with a simple link. Collaborate without technical barriers.
share.shortDescription: Share results and reports with a simple link.

updates.title: Automatic updates
updates.description: Always the latest version, without any action on your part. New features arrive instantly.
updates.shortDescription: Always the latest version, no action needed.

webReady.title: Web Application
webReady.description: Full access from your browser, no installation required.

mobileComingSoon.title: Mobile Application
mobileComingSoon.description: Access your data from your smartphone.

security.title: A secure platform for your research
security.subtitle: The security and integrity of your data are our absolute priorities.
security.description: Your research data deserves maximum protection. Our infrastructure is designed to meet the requirements of the strictest institutions.

https.title: HTTPS/TLS Encryption
https.description: All communications are encrypted via TLS to ensure the confidentiality of your exchanges.

rgpd.title: GDPR Compliance
rgpd.description: Fully compliant with the European General Data Protection Regulation.

jwt.title: JWT Authentication
jwt.description: Secure token-based authentication system with automatic refresh.

sanitization.title: Data Validation
sanitization.description: XSS injection protection through systematic input sanitization.

headers.title: Security Headers
headers.description: CSRF, clickjacking and XSS protection via hardened HTTP headers.

european.title: European Standard
european.description: Proudly developed and hosted within the European Union.

platforms.title: Accessible everywhere, on all your screens
platforms.subtitle: A responsive web application that adapts to your device: desktop, tablet or smartphone.

web.title: One app, all your screens
web.description: Odin is a mobile-first web application. The interface adapts to your screen size for an optimal experience, whether you are at the office or in the field.

tools.title: Everything you need
tools.subtitle: A suite of powerful tools for every step of your workflow.

muninAtlas.title: Munin Atlas
muninAtlas.description: Cartographic visualization of your experimental data and real-time spatial collaboration.

huginLab.title: Hugin Lab

analysis.title: Advanced Analysis
analysis.description: Statistical engines and AI to identify invisible trends in your datasets.

why.title: Why choose Odin?

collaboration.title: Collaboration

flexibility.title: Mobile flexibility

mentions.title: Legal notices
mentions.editorIntro: The website Odin La Science (hereinafter "OLS") is a web-based learning platform for sciences (bacteriology, mycology, etc.).
mentions.ipContent1: All content on the OLS website (texts, images, illustrations, photographs, logos, icons, sounds, videos, software, databases, layouts) is the exclusive property of [TO BE COMPLETED] or its partners and is protected by French and international intellectual property laws.
mentions.ipContent2: Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or adaptation, in whole or in part, of any of these elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without the prior written authorization of [TO BE COMPLETED].
mentions.ipContent3: Any unauthorized use of the website or any of its elements shall be considered as counterfeiting and prosecuted in accordance with articles L.335-2 and following of the French Intellectual Property Code.
mentions.liabilityIntro: The information on the OLS website is as accurate as possible and the site is regularly updated. However, [TO BE COMPLETED] cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information published on the site. [TO BE COMPLETED] shall not be held liable for:
mentions.liabilityItem1: Direct or indirect damage caused to the user's equipment when accessing the site
mentions.liabilityItem2: Direct or indirect damage resulting from the use of information provided on the site
mentions.liabilityItem3: Any malfunction, inability to access, or poor conditions of use of the site attributable to force majeure, scheduled or unscheduled maintenance, or events beyond the control of [TO BE COMPLETED]
mentions.liabilityItem4: The content of external websites to which hyperlinks on the site may refer
mentions.liabilityCookieNote: The user is informed that during visits to the site, one or more cookies may be automatically installed on their browser software (see section 5).
mentions.cookiesContent1: The OLS website does not use HTTP cookies. User authentication relies on a JWT (JSON Web Token) Bearer Token system, transmitted via HTTP request headers and not stored in cookies.
mentions.cookiesContent2: No advertising, tracking, or analytics cookies are deposited during browsing as of the last update of these notices.
mentions.cookiesContent3: Should cookies for audience analysis or performance measurement be deployed in the future, this section will be updated in compliance with applicable regulations (GDPR and CNIL recommendations). User consent will be obtained prior to any non-essential cookie deposit.
mentions.dataContent1: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - EU Regulation 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act of January 6, 1978, users have rights regarding their personal data (access, rectification, deletion, portability, restriction, objection).
mentions.dataContent2: For any information regarding the processing of your personal data, please consult our Privacy Policy. To exercise your rights or for any questions regarding data protection, you can contact us:
mentions.dataCnil: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the French Data Protection Authority (CNIL): https://www.cnil.fr.
mentions.jurisdictionContent: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute relating to the use of the OLS website, and failing amicable resolution, the competent courts of [TO BE COMPLETED] shall have sole jurisdiction.
mentions.updateNotice: These legal notices may be modified at any time. Users are invited to consult them regularly.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.serviceContent: Odin La Science (OLS) is a SaaS learning platform for sciences (bacteriology, mycology, among others) intended for laboratories and universities. It offers interactive educational modules and an integrated instant messaging system.

accountData.name: First and last name
accountData.passwordNote: The password is never stored in plain text. Only an irreversible cryptographic hash is retained.

sessionData.limitNote: The number of concurrent sessions is limited to 3 per user. Each user can view and revoke their active sessions from their personal space.

contactsData.notesPurpose: Free-form information entered by the user — Contract performance

privacy.historyContent: Actions performed on the platform are tracked with JSON snapshots of the state before and after modification. This traceability enables auditing, educational tracking, and incident resolution. Legal basis: Legitimate interest (service security and quality).
privacy.annotationsContent: Users can add text notes to platform entities (modules, results, etc.). These annotations are linked to the user's account. Legal basis: Contract performance.

notifications.metadataPurpose: Routing and contextual display — Contract performance

organizations.membersPurpose: Access and role management — Contract performance

privacy.authMechanismContent: OLS uses a stateless JWT (JSON Web Token) Bearer Token system: access token with a 15-minute lifetime, refresh token with a 7-day lifetime.
privacy.noCookiesContent: OLS does not use HTTP cookies. Authentication relies exclusively on JWT tokens transmitted in request headers.
privacy.retentionNote: Upon expiration of these periods, data is deleted or irreversibly anonymized.

subprocessors.google: External authentication — US / EU — Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC)
subprocessors.cas: University authentication — France (EU) — No transfer outside EU
subprocessors.infomaniak: Email sending (SMTP) — Switzerland — EU adequacy decision

privacy.subprocessorsNote: No subprocessor has access to user passwords (these are hashed before any storage).

security.sessionLimit: Limited to 3 concurrent sessions per user

privacy.rightsIntro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

rights.accessDesc: Obtain a copy of all your personal data.
rights.erasureDesc: Request the deletion of your personal data.
rights.portabilityDesc: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
rights.restrictionDesc: Request the restriction of processing of your data.
rights.objectionDesc: Object to the processing of your data on legitimate grounds.

privacy.rightsExerciseContent: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at: [TO BE COMPLETED]. We commit to responding within one month of receiving your request, in accordance with regulations.

rightsFeatures.sessions: Session management: you can view your active sessions and revoke them directly from your personal space.
rightsFeatures.export: Data export: this feature is under development and will be available soon.
rightsFeatures.deletion: Account deletion: this feature is under development. In the meantime, any deletion request can be sent by email to the address indicated above.

privacy.complaintContent: If you believe that the processing of your personal data constitutes a violation of the GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the French Data Protection Authority (CNIL): https://www.cnil.fr — 3 Place de Fontenoy, TSA 80715, 75334 Paris Cedex 07.
privacy.changesContent: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. In the event of a substantial change, users will be notified via a notification on the platform. The last update date appears at the top of this document.
privacy.contactContent: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or the processing of your personal data:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.draftNotice: DRAFT — This document must be validated by a legal professional before publication.
terms.purposeContent1: These Terms of Use (hereinafter "ToU") define the terms and conditions of use of the Odin La Science platform (hereinafter "OLS" or "the Service"), accessible at [TO BE COMPLETED].
terms.purposeContent2: OLS is a SaaS web platform dedicated to learning in sciences, particularly bacteriology and mycology. It offers species identification modules with scoring systems, a contact book, note-taking and annotation features, a notification system, a quick sharing mechanism (QuickShare), and organization and team management.
terms.purposeContent3: The Service is intended for laboratories, universities, students, and scientific professionals.
terms.acceptanceContent1: Registration for the Service and its use imply full and complete acceptance of these ToU. The user acknowledges having read them and agrees to comply with them.
terms.acceptanceContent2: Any registration or use of the Service constitutes unreserved acceptance of these ToU in their version in force at the time of registration or use.
terms.registrationContent1: Access to the Service requires the creation of a user account. Registration is open to any natural or legal person wishing to use the Service for educational, research, or professional purposes.
terms.registrationContent2: The user agrees to provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information during registration.

authMethods.local: Local account: creation of an account with email address and password
authMethods.google: Google OAuth: authentication via a Google account
authMethods.cas: University CAS: authentication via the CAS system of the user's institution

terms.emailVerificationContent: Account activation is subject to verification of the email address provided during registration. A verification email is sent to the user, who must confirm their address before accessing the Service.
terms.passwordContent1: The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their login credentials (email address and password). Any activity carried out from their account is presumed to have been performed by them.
terms.passwordContent2: The user agrees to immediately inform the editor of any unauthorized use of their account or any breach of its security.
terms.sessionsContent: The number of concurrent sessions is limited to three (3) per user account. Beyond this limit, the oldest session may be automatically disconnected.
terms.accuracyContent: The user agrees to keep their personal information up to date. The editor shall not be held liable for consequences related to erroneous or outdated information.

authorized.educational: Educational: learning and training in sciences
authorized.research: Research: support for scientific research activities
authorized.professional: Professional: continuing education and skill development in laboratory

prohibited.illegal: Using the Service for illegal, fraudulent purposes or infringing the rights of third parties
prohibited.unauthorized: Attempting unauthorized access to systems, servers, or networks related to the Service
prohibited.scraping: Collecting, extracting, or automatically exploiting Service data (scraping, crawling, etc.)
prohibited.harmful: Distributing illegal, defamatory, insulting, discriminatory content, or content contrary to public order
prohibited.disrupt: Disrupting or attempting to disrupt the normal operation of the Service
prohibited.shareCredentials: Sharing login credentials with third parties
prohibited.commercial: Using the Service for commercial purposes not authorized by the editor
prohibited.bypass: Circumventing technical protection or access restriction measures implemented by the editor

terms.ownershipContent: The user remains the owner of all content they create, import, or enter as part of using the Service, including:

ownership.contacts: Contacts stored in the contact book

terms.licenseContent: By using the Service, the user grants the editor a non-exclusive, worldwide license limited to the duration of Service use, solely for the purposes of providing, maintaining, and improving the Service. This license terminates upon deletion of the user account.
terms.contentResponsibilityContent: The user is solely responsible for content they publish or share via the Service, particularly via the QuickShare feature. The editor shall not be held liable for user-generated content.
terms.ipPedagogicalContent: All educational content made available on the Service (texts, images, diagrams, scientific data, learning modules, species databases) is the exclusive property of the editor or its rights holders. Any reproduction, representation, modification, or distribution, in whole or in part, is prohibited without prior written authorization from the editor.
terms.ipSoftwareContent: The source code, software architecture, user interface, graphic elements, and the name "Odin La Science" are the exclusive property of the editor. They are protected by the provisions of the French Intellectual Property Code relating to copyright and trademark law.
terms.bestEffortContent: The editor commits to implementing the necessary means for the proper functioning of the Service. This is a best-effort obligation, not a guarantee of results. The editor does not guarantee that the Service will be free from interruptions, errors, or defects.
terms.maintenanceContent: The editor reserves the right to temporarily interrupt access to the Service for maintenance, update, or improvement purposes. The editor will endeavor to notify users within a reasonable timeframe before any scheduled interruption.

betaStatus.bugs: The Service may present malfunctions, errors, or incomplete features
betaStatus.stability: The editor does not guarantee the stability or permanence of features offered in beta version
betaStatus.conditions: Specific conditions for the beta phase are presented to the user during their use of the Service
betaStatus.changes: The editor reserves the right to modify, suspend, or remove features without notice during the beta phase

terms.dataProtectionContent1: The editor commits to processing users' personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act.
terms.dataProtectionContent2: The terms of collection, processing, and retention of personal data are detailed in the Privacy Policy, accessible at [TO BE COMPLETED]. For any questions regarding data protection, the user can contact the data controller at [TO BE COMPLETED].

editorLiability.interruptions: Temporary interruptions of the Service, regardless of cause
editorLiability.damages: Direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use the Service
editorLiability.dataLoss: Loss of data or user content, particularly during the beta phase
editorLiability.scientific: Damages related to the use of scientific content for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes
editorLiability.userContent: Content published or shared by users
editorLiability.technical: Any malfunction related to the user's technical environment (browser, internet connection, etc.)

terms.userLiabilityContent: The user is responsible for their use of the Service and agrees to indemnify the editor for any damage resulting from non-compliance with these ToU.
terms.userTerminationContent: The user may request account deletion at any time. This feature is being deployed. In the meantime, any deletion request can be sent to [TO BE COMPLETED]. Account deletion results in the permanent deletion of associated data, subject to legal retention obligations.

editorTermination.abuse: Fraudulent or abusive use of the Service
editorTermination.inactivity: Prolonged account inactivity (duration to be defined)
editorTermination.authority: Request from a competent judicial or administrative authority

terms.editorTerminationNote: The editor will endeavor to inform the user in advance, except in case of emergency or legal obligation.
terms.changesContent1: The editor reserves the right to modify these ToU at any time. Users will be informed of any substantial change by:

changes.email: An email sent to the address associated with the user account

terms.changesContent2: Continued use of the Service after notification of changes constitutes acceptance of the new ToU. In case of disagreement, the user may proceed with account deletion in accordance with article 11.
terms.jurisdictionContent1: These ToU are subject to French law.
terms.jurisdictionContent2: In the event of a dispute relating to the interpretation or performance of these ToU, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution prior to any legal action.
terms.jurisdictionContent3: Failing amicable resolution, any dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of [TO BE COMPLETED].
terms.contactIntro: For any questions regarding these ToU or the Service, the user can contact the editor:

platforms.description: Munin Atlas hosts scientific identification tools. Hugin Lab hosts your laboratory tools. Click to explore.
platforms.title: Platforms

welcome.description: This is your personal dashboard. Let's explore it together.
welcome.title: Welcome to Odin La Science!

modules.description: Each card represents a tool. Click to open it in your workspace.
modules.title: Available Tools

welcome.description: Lab hosts your laboratory tools: notes, contacts, file sharing, support, and more.
welcome.title: Hugin Lab

actions.description: Use the command palette or go back to the home page to pick a module.
actions.title: Open a Module

activityBar.description: Pin your favorite modules here for one-click access.

menuBar.description: You can also navigate via the menu to access platforms and modules.

whatsNew.description: Here's what's new in this version
